positive: Minimalist abstract landscape composition, featuring smooth flowing organic lines and soft geometric shapes forming a serene horizon. Focus on a balanced composition with high contrast and subtle gradients. Color palette of muted earth tones, sage green, and soft beige. Clean vector aesthetic, suitable for screen printing. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, high resolution, graphic design quality, unisex appeal.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, grain, noise, watermark, text, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, monochrome, oversaturated, messy, complex details
